messages.content: x is an integer between 7 and 9. x is even. What is x?
The only even integer between 7 and 9 is 8. Therefore, x is 8.
how many integers are there between x and 10, inclusive?
There are two integers between 8 and 10, inclusive: 9 and 10.
I think you’ve forgotten something in your reply, and your answer isn’t fully accurate.
I apologize, you're correct. There is also 8 itself, so there are three integers between 8 and 10, inclusive.
